nodes.name: 星蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 星蜂鸟（Calliope hummingbird，学名 Selasphorus calliope），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点。
nodes.shortSummary: 星蜂鸟（学名：Selasphorus calliope），是雨燕目蜂鸟科的一种鸟类。 星蜂鸟体重约2.64克，翼长约41.4毫米，嘴峰长约17.8毫米，喙宽度约2.1毫米，喙厚度约1.5毫米，跗蹠长约4.4毫米，尾长约22毫米。星蜂鸟是候鸟，其栖息在半开放的灌木丛中，食性为草食…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The calliope hummingbird ( ; Selasphorus calliope) is the smallest bird native to the United States and Canada. It has a western breeding range mainly from California to British Columbia, and migrates to the Southwestern United States, Mexico, and Central America for its wintering grounds. The calliope hummingbird is the smallest known long-distance bird migrant, completing migrations twice per year of some . It was previously considered the only member of the genus Stellula (meaning little star), but research evidence suggests its existing placement in the genus Selasphorus.{{cite journal |author1=McGuire, J.A

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They nest in western North America from southern British Columbia and Alberta south to Colorado and southern California. During winter, they move mainly through Arizona and New Mexico and northern Mexico, to winter in southwestern Mexico
